LightningComponentBundle.description: Flow Screen component that navigates to a newly created Order record.

property.name: orderId
property.label: Order Id
property.description: The Id of the Order to navigate to.

property.name: quoteId
property.label: Quote Id
property.description: The Id of the Quote if there are multiple Orders

property.name: disableAutoRedirect
property.label: Disable Auto Redirect
property.description: For debugging, prevents automatic navigation when true.
